evals.prompt: /spec-dev 写用户认证的 spec，支持邮箱密码登录和 OAuth
evals.expected_output: Should enter Spec mode: create a feature spec with goal (user perspective), behavior constraints as pre/behavior/post triples, state machine, testable AC, BDD Gherkin scenarios, TDD pointers, and out of scope. No UI details.

evals.prompt: 拖拽排序功能做完了，帮我更新一下文档
evals.expected_output: Should enter Sync mode: read git diff, find related specs, update AC status, check module contracts, identify ADR candidates, produce sync report.

evals.prompt: 新项目刚初始化，Vue 3 + Pinia + Vitest，帮我建立文档体系
evals.expected_output: Should enter Init mode: scan project, propose four-layer directory structure, write progressively starting with CLAUDE.md and conventions.md.
